description: This pipeline generates masks for macrophages with phagocytosed bacteria. The main steps involve taking the macrophages as input, and then applying the roi-to-rgb conversion to generate a mask.

469fc63a-2aa0-4873-9a9c-5a49de3ce74e.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
469fc63a-2aa0-4873-9a9c-5a49de3ce74e.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

a89c8d06-e94c-4c37-944e-926075045712.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
a89c8d06-e94c-4c37-944e-926075045712.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
